title: Chocolate Chip Cookies
steps: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Whisk the flour, baking soda, and salt together in a small bowl.
Cream the butter and both sugars together until light and fluffy, about three to four minutes.
Beat in the eggs one at a time, then mix in the vanilla.
Gradually mix in the dry ingredients on low speed until just combined.
Stir in the chocolate chips by hand.
Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
Bake for nine to eleven minutes, or until the edges are golden brown.

title: Pancakes
steps: Whisk the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar together in a large bowl.
Make a well in the center and pour in the milk, egg, and melted butter.
Mix until just combined; a few small lumps are fine.
Heat a lightly oiled skillet over medium-high heat.
Pour roughly a quarter cup of batter for each pancake and cook until bubbles form on top.
Flip and cook the other side for about a minute, until golden.

title: Grilled Cheese
steps: Butter one side of each slice of bread.
Place one slice butter-side down in a cold skillet and layer the cheeses on top.
Top with the second slice, butter-side up.
Cook over medium-low heat until the bottom is deep golden, about four minutes.
Flip carefully and cook the other side until golden and the cheese is fully melted.

title: Guacamole
steps: Halve and pit the avocados, then scoop the flesh into a medium bowl.
Add the onion, jalapeño, cilantro, lime juice, and salt.
Mash with a fork to your preferred texture, leaving some chunks for body.
Taste and adjust salt or lime as needed.
Serve immediately, or press plastic wrap directly on the surface to keep it green.
